a.xlink:title: Returns an owning pointer to the current CommState.
Sets the name of the current participant as a logging attribute.
Configures the coupling interface from the given xml file.
returns an blank commstate representing MPI_COMM_NULL
Initializes the MPI environment and manages it.
Sets the current MPI rank as a logging attribute.
Configures the given configuration from file configurationFilename.
Returns root xml tag to start the automatic configuration process.
Returns full name consisting of xml namespace + ":" + name.
Adds an XML tag as subtag by making a copy of the given tag.
